app.name: LiaMatch
app.tagline: Match LIA students and employers in a serious, focused way

common.errorBody: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

home.heroSubtitle: Fast onboarding. Clear profiles. Simple listings. Smart matching.
home.featureProfileDesc: Create a profile showcasing who you are, your skills, and what you're looking for.
home.featureMatchDesc: Our algorithm ranks internships based on track, skills, city, and period.
home.featureChatDesc: Communicate directly with potential employers through real-time messaging.
home.step1Desc: Sign up with your email and choose your role – student or company.
home.step2Desc: Add your skills, projects, and availability.
home.step3Desc: The algorithm ranks and suggests the best matches for you.
home.step4Desc: Apply directly or start a chat with the company.
home.ctaSubtitle: Create a free account and start matching with the right internship or candidate today.

auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: LiaMatch cares about your privacy. This policy describes what personal data we collect, why we do it, and your rights under GDPR.
privacy.whatWeCollect1: Account information: email address and password (encrypted)
privacy.whatWeCollect2: Profile data: name, school, city, skills, CV, cover letter
privacy.whatWeCollect3: Company profile: company name, website, description, logo
privacy.whatWeCollect5: Technical data: IP address (for rate limiting), user agent
privacy.why2: Provide matching between students and companies
privacy.why3: Improve the service through anonymous feedback and analytics
privacy.why4: Send notifications about applications and messages
privacy.storage: All data is stored in Supabase (EU/Frankfurt) with encryption at rest and in transit. Passwords are hashed with bcrypt. Files are stored in Supabase Storage with per-user access control.
privacy.rights1: Right of access — Export all your data from your profile.
privacy.rights2: Right to erasure — Delete your account and all associated data.
privacy.rights3: Right to rectification — Update your profile at any time.
privacy.rights4: Right to data portability — Download your data in JSON format.
privacy.cookies: We use a single cookie (lang) to save your language preference. No tracking cookies or third-party cookies are used.
privacy.contact: Questions about your data? Contact us at:

gdpr.exportDesc: Download all your personal data in JSON format.
gdpr.exportError: Could not export data. Please try again.
gdpr.deleteDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
gdpr.deleteConfirmBody: All your data will be permanently deleted, including profile, messages, applications, and files. Type DELETE to confirm.
gdpr.deleteError: Could not delete account. Please try again.

cookieConsent.message: We use a cookie to save your language preference.
